series_metadata.series_description: This series documents internal quality reviews and testing of material showing compliance and any corrective action taken to maintain lab accreditation. This series includes, but is not limited to: reports, inspections, letters, and forms.

series_metadata.series_title: Aggregate and Cement Hopper Scale Calibration
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the calibration of hoppers, scales, and/or bins used to weigh aggregate and cement. This series may include, but is not limited to: reports.

This series documents the number of samples of central-mix aggregate and open-graded aggregate that were obtained and the names of the plants from which the samples were obtained. This series may include, but is not limited to: log books.
This series documents rock and soil formation data gathered from samples taken during routine project borings. This series may include, but is not limited to: surveys.

This series documents semi-annual inspections of scales in asphalt and aggregate plants that weigh materials and producer surety bonds that ensure delivery of the materials promised by the producer plant. This series may include, but is not limited to: reports and surety bonds.

series_metadata.series_title: Asphalt and Total Ton Sampling Logs
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the preliminary and total number of tons for raw and mixed asphalt samples that were taken and used for road projects. This series may include, but is not limited to: log books.

This series documents a weigh monitor's visit to producer plants and quarries to inspect weigh scales, verify a weighperson's performance of duties according to standards, administer examinations for weighperson certification, and deliver the legal load list to the producer. This series may include, but is not limited to: diaries.

This series documents the location, identification, and load bearing capacity of the various soil and rock types within the limits of a major road project. This series includes, but is not limited to: logs, photographs, and plan sheets.

This series documents preliminary identification and lab test results of soil from potential borrow pit sites. This series may include, but is not limited to:maps, drill logs, lab test results, and correspondence.
This series documents the calibration of a plant's oven settings at the time of sample testing. This series may include, but is not limited to: forms, data sheets, worksheets, and reports.

retention_rules.trigger_event: equipment, facility, property sold or no longer in use

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the issuance of cement and flyash certifications. This series includes, but is not limited to: cement certification letters, memorandums, and forms.

This series documents a semi-annual report of each producer plant and quarry that includes plant name and identification number, location, certified weighperson name, scale company, monitor date, the last date scales were certified, and the expiration date of the surety bond. This series may include, but is not limited to: reports.
This series documents investigations conducted by the agency's lab of a concrete cylinder after failure. This series may include, but is not limited to: forms

This series documents concrete samples that were sent to the lab for testing that include the date the samples were forwarded and the date when the test results were returned. This series may include, but is not limited to: log books.

This series documents the inspection of a concrete producer plant and the agency project site where the concrete was tested and delivered. This series may include, but is not limited to: forms and reports.
This series documents the type and method of construction and the materials used in current statewide road projects. This series may include, but is not limited to: graphic plan sheets.
This series documents landslide or sink hole corrective action sketch designs for construction and residency maintenance projects. This series may include, but is not limited to: sketches.
This series documents project inspectors' sign-out receipts for field equipment and the location of the equipment. This series may include, but is not limited to: receipts and reports.
This series documents field notes for work on soil, major or minor structures, and geology of slope designs. This series may include, but is not limited to: notebooks.
This series documents geological studies about problems on existing roads and structures. This series may include, but is not limited to: requests, studies, and reviews.

This series documents a comparison sampling of test results and evaluations that verifies that the required comparison sampling was performed. This series may include, but is not limited to: forms and reports.

This series documents the annual inspection of each producer pugmill plant to determine if the plant's pugmill used to add moisture to central-mix aggregate and the plant's lab equipment are in compliance with the agency's specifications. This series may include, but is not limited to: reports.
This series documents inspections of producer plant and quarry vehicle scales to ensure asphalt and aggregate materials are weighed correctly. This series may include, but is not limited to: reports.

This series documents the inspection of lumber mills to ensure that the chemicals used to treat lumber being used for road projects are in compliance with the agency's specifications. This series may include, but is not limited to: reports

series_metadata.series_title: Investigations: Major and Minor Structures, Soil Survey, and Special Geologic Conditions
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents investigations and design recommendations for major structures (bridge foundations and walls), minor structures (pipe and box culverts), pavement strength and mixes, and special geologic conditions such as landslides, sink holes, and slope failures. This series may include but is not limited to: plan sheets, reports, test results, surveys, and correspondence.

This series documents geologist investigations of claims filed by individuals of alleged damage to their water wells that may have occurred due to work conducted at road project sites such as blasting. This series may include, but is not limited to: forms, reports, and correspondence.
This series documents investigations and tests of a producer's quarry prior to its use as a materials supplier to the agency. This series may include, but is not limited to: forms and reports.
This series documents job mix formulas approved by the agency for use on its road projects. This series may include, but is not limited to: forms, statements, reports.
This series documents the calibration of laboratory testing equipment. This series may include, but is not limited to: calibration certification, calibration results Sheet, check list, and forms.

retention_rules.trigger_event: equipment, facility, property sold or no longer in use

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents each material sample received for testing. This series includes, but is not limited to: a database.

This series documents the weight of materials of a given sieve size in order to perform computations and obtain laboratory test results. This series may include, but is not limited to: worksheets and reports

This series documents approval of the latex mix design and the agency's calibration check of the mixture to ensure that the mix is calibrated to the agency's specifications. This series may include, but is not limited to: data sheets and forms.

This series documents latex cylinder samples that were tested for compliance with agency specifications when latex is placed on a bridge as a pavement overlay. This series may include, but is not limited to: forms.
This series documents the type, cost, location, amount, and status of the Division's major equipment. This series may include, but is not limited to: forms and a database.

retention_rules.trigger_event: equipment, facility, property sold or no longer in use

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the shipment and receipt of material samples sent to agency laboratories for testing. This series includes, but is not limited to: notices and forms.
This series documents testing of material samples and products used for highway construction and maintenance, and includes the results. This series includes, but is not limited to: forms and reports.
This series documents the status of the Materials Notebook that is submitted by the project inspector when the project is completed. This series may include, but is not limited to: notebooks.

This series documents information about each materials producer or supplier to the agency or the agency's contractors to ensure that all materials used for road projects have been pre-tested and approved according to specifications for quality assurance. This series may include, but is not limited to: forms, reports, and correspondence.

This series documents New Products Committee decisions regarding the purchase of products that are not covered in specifications, plans, or other standards. This series may include, but is not limited to: agendas, correspondence, and minutes.

series_metadata.series_title: New Products Committee: New Products Evaluation List (NPEL)
series_metadata.series_description: This series documents each product evaluated by the New Products Committee. This series includes, but is not limited to: list.
This series documents requests for Non-Destructive Testing (NDT) of materials used in various projects. This series includes but is not limited to: a database
This series documents the calibration of density gauges. This series may include, but is not limited to: calibration reports, warranties, and original certificates.

retention_rules.trigger_event: equipment, facility, property sold or no longer in use

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents semi-annual radiation leak tests conducted on nuclear gauges that monitors the condition of testing equipment containing nuclear material. This series includes, but is not limited to: reports and correspondence.
This series documents the location of each nuclear moisture density gauge and the semi-annual radiation leak tests conducted on each gauge. This series includes, but is not limited to: a database.

retention_rules.trigger_event: equipment, facility, property sold or no longer in use

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents safety procedures for handling, transporting, and storing nuclear gauges when a gauge is taken to a VDOT temporary storage site. This series includes, but is not limited to: forms.
This series documents the location of each nuclear gauge owned by VDOT containing nuclear material. This series may include, but is not limited to: forms.

retention_rules.trigger_event: equipment, facility, property sold or no longer in use

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents reporting of radiation exposure tests conducted on VDOT employees who use testing equipment containing nuclear material. This series may include, but is not limited to: reports and forms.
This series documents pavement designs and calculations for road construction and maintenance projects. This series may include, but is not limited to: requests, calculations, plans,

This series documents the evaluation and investigation of a problem with pavement and recommendations to resolve the problem. This series may include, but is not limited to: surveys, evaluations, reports, and correspondence.
This series documents the type and quality of pavement materials such as concrete, asphalt, and slurry used on the roads. This series may include, but is not limited to: forms.

This series documents recommendations about roads that are in the most need of repair and should be added to the residencies road maintenance schedules. This series may include, but is not limited to: correspondence surveys, and forms.

This series documents weigh monitoring, legal load determinations, and bond sureties of producer plants and quarries to ensure the plant or quarry is bonded, weigh is monitored accurately, and all trucks have a determined load limit. This series may include, but is not limited to: surety bonds, reports, and forms.
This series documents asphalt and aggregate producer plants that are certified to do business with VDOT. This series may include, but is not limited to: letters, forms, and reports.
This series documents the inspection and final approval of a contractor's plant laboratory. This series includes, but is not limited to: Plant Lab Inspection reports, forms, and correspondence
This series documents preliminary engineering work on projects that have not gone to construction. This series may include, but is not limited to: correspondence, plan sheets, and reports.

This series documents the type of material (concrete, asphalt, aggregate, soil, or steel), standards, and specifications of the material(density, tonnage, mixture, quantity, supplier) used in federal and state funded road, bridge, and sign structure projects. This series may include, but is not limited to: tests, forms, reports, and correspondence.
This series documents quality assurance and quality control of materials produced by suppliers. This series includes, but is not limited to: plans, forms, and correspondence.

This series documents X-Rays taken of metal plate welding prior to installation on sign structures and bridges to identify defects in the metal welding. This series may include, but is not limited to: X-Rays.

This series documents the measurement of vibration magnitude versus time on thermal photo sensitive paper or seismographic tape that is used to advise a contractor to alter road construction activities such as blasting, pile driving, and traffic. This series may include, but is not limited to: seismograph tapes.
This series documents soil surveying at locations requiring remediation such as landslides and slippage. This series may include, but is not limited to: soil survey reports, correspondence.

This series documents tests conducted on soil taken from statewide road project areas prior to the start of the project's construction. This series may include, but is not limited to: sample reports, test results, surveys, and correspondence.
This series documents the bond status of each producer plant and quarry. This series may include, but is not limited to: surety bonds and correspondence.

This series documents quantity checks and compatibility tests of surface treatment mixes to determine how the surface is wearing and correct problems with the surface treatment mix. This series may include, but is not limited to: forms and surveys.

This series documents the certification, bonding, and testing of the weigh monitor stations at each producer plant and quarry that supplies materials to the agency for road projects to ensure that the weighperson is certified, plant is bonded, vehicle scales weigh correctly, and weigh tickets are completed properly. This series may include, but is not limited to: certificates, forms and reports.

This series documents the certification of persons to be responsible for weighing trucks and materials at producer plants and quarries. This series may include, but is not limited to: certificates and tests
